title: Umbraco Marketplace Package Owner Information
description: JSON schema definition for the additional information provided by package owners to expand a package's marketplace listing.

AlternateCategory.description: An optional secondary category in which the package will be listed.

AlternatePackageNames.description: A collection of alternate package names used for data matching from other systems. For example, a name provided in a package.manifest file that differs from the NuGet package Id can be provided here.

AuthorDetails.description: Further details about the author of the package.

Name.description: The name of the the package author. If provided this will override the Authors field retrieved from the NuGet package

ImageUrl.description: A URL to the package author's profile image.

Description.description: A short description of the package author.

Url.description: A URL to the package developer's blog or other public profile.

Contributors.description: A collection of one or more key contributors/co-authors of the package.

Url.description: A URL to the contributor's blog or other public profile.

SyncContributorsFromRepository.description: If contributors are not explicitly provided, a GitHub repository is available in the 'RepositoryUrl' of the NuGet package, and this option is set to true; the contributors will be synchronized from the GitHub repo.

Category.description: The category in which the package will be listed.

Description.description: The package description, which if provided will be used instead of the information retrieved from NuGet.

DiscussionForumUrl.description: A URL to a discussion forum about the package.

DocumentationUrl.description: A URL to documentation about the package.

IssueTrackerUrl.description: A URL to an issue tracker for the package.

LicenseTypes.description: The available license types for the package.

LicenseType.description: The license type name. DEPRECATED - use LicenseTypes instead.

LookingForContributors.description: Set to true if you'd like your package indicated on the Marketplace as looking for contributors to help with development or support.

LookingForMaintainer.description: Set to true if you are looking to move away from supporting your package and would welcome someone stepping forward as a new maintainer.

IsSubPackageOf.description: The NuGet package Id of a 'parent' package, allowing for packages with multiple subtle variations to be displayed under a single listing.

PackagesByAuthor.description: A collection of packages created by the same author.

items.description: A collection of related packages created by the same author.

Description.description: A short description of the package.

GroupTitle.description: An optional group title used to list this and following packages without a specified title under a heading.

items.description: A collection of package media assets.

ImageUrl.description: The URL to an image file.

VideoUrl.description: The URL to a video file.

Title.description: The package title, which if provided will be used instead of the information retrieved from NuGet.

VersionDependencyMode.description: Defines the version dependency mode. Set to 'Semver' to avoid any assumptions being made about Umbraco version support when importing. For example, by default we assume a package defined with a minimum dependency of <= 13 and no maximum will not work on Umbraco 14. By setting this value to 'SemVer' we will respect the unlimited maximum indicated.

VideoUrl.description: A URL to an embeddable video demonstrating the package.
